topic: Trump Powell firing - CP meta question
summary: CP at exactly 9% threshold; Trump recently revived fire rhetoric but no action; successor announcement expected early 2026
content:
Key findings for meta-prediction question on CP for Powell firing question:

1. CP as of Jan 3: 9.00% (exactly at the threshold)
2. Threshold: strictly > 9.00% on Jan 15
3. Trump Dec 29 2025: Said he'd "love to fire" Powell, "Maybe I still might", mentioned "gross incompetence" lawsuit possibility
4. Trump Dec 2 2025: Said he'd announce Fed chair successor in "early 2026" - originally suggested around Christmas but pushed to early 2026
5. Trump said successor announcement would be "in January sometime" per Dec 29 article
6. Manifold market for underlying question: 6.1% (below Metaculus 9%)
7. 209 forecasters on Metaculus (moderate base)
8. The April 2025 pattern: Trump threatened, then backed off (said he had no plans to fire Powell on April 22)
9. Trump has a preferred candidate but hasn't announced yet
10. Powell's term ends May 15, 2026 - only ~4 months away
